pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh:10, export_result.sh:10 - directory creation and file path usage consistent across all scripts
Verified in setup_task.sh:13, export_result.sh:11, 39 - project directory and file path prefix referenced consistently
setup_qgis.sh:71 - sample_polygon.geojson contains Polygon geometry type
setup_qgis.sh:67-82 - sample_polygon.geojson contains exactly 2 Feature objects (Area A and Area B)
setup_qgis.sh:95 - sample_points.geojson contains Point geometry type
setup_qgis.sh:94-98 - sample_points.geojson contains exactly 3 Feature objects (Point A, Point B, Point C)
setup_qgis.sh:110-111 - sample_lines.geojson contains LineString geometry type
setup_qgis.sh:109-112 - sample_lines.geojson contains exactly 2 Feature objects (Road 1 and Road 2)

privileged_info_summary: The task consolidates three synthetic GeoJSON data layers into a single GeoPackage file. Source data is created during environment setup via setup_qgis.sh: sample_polygon.geojson contains 2 Polygon features named zones (Area A and Area B); sample_points.geojson contains 3 Point features named stations (Point A, Point B, Point C); sample_lines.geojson contains 2 LineString features named roads (Road 1 and Road 2). The target GeoPackage file is expected at /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/project_data.gpkg and the QGIS project at /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/delivery_project. All metadata claims regarding layer names, geometry types, and feature counts have been verified against the source GeoJSON definitions embedded in the environment setup script.
